$comment: The thin layer: model reads the (unordered, possibly inconsistent) specs and emits a strict ordered build plan. output_schema forces the shape so a compose foreach can consume `units` in order with no parsing.

units.description: every unit, in dependency order (foundation/data first, dependents later)

contracts.description: canonical shared names/types every unit must agree on

normalizedFrom.description: the other name(s) seen for this thing; empty if the specs were already consistent
